channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Pitso Dladla Joins Golden Arrows After Successful Durban City Tenure
item.description: Sifiso 'Pitso' Dladla, the 46-year-old coach who led Durban City to a historic Nedbank Cup victory over TS Galaxy in 2026, has secured a permanent role at Lamontville Golden Arrows following Manqoba M...

item.title: Iran Halts Three Oil Tankers in Hormuz Strait Amid Strategic Concerns
item.description: Iran has reportedly intercepted three oil tankers passing through the strategic Strait of Hormuz, raising concerns about regional security and energy supply routes. The incident, reported by Agence Fr...

item.title: Apple's Potential Leased iPhone Restrictions Due to Missed Payments
item.description: The article discusses a potential feature in iOS 27 that could allow Apple to restrict leased iPhones if users miss payments. The code, part of the 9to5mac.com report, suggests a system called 'App Ma...

item.title: Former Nairobi Governor Anne Kananu Defects to NEDP, Eyes Mara Parliamentary Seat
item.description: Former Nairobi Governor Anne Kananu has officially left President William Ruto's United Democratic Alliance (UDA) party and joined the National Economic Development Party (NEDP), led by her predecesso...

item.title: Mexican immigrant convicted of murdering girlfriend sues Trump over campaign remarks
item.description: Brandon Ortiz-Vite, a 27-year-old Mexican national, has filed a lawsuit against former US President Donald Trump after being convicted of murdering his girlfriend, Ruby Garcia, in March 2024. Ortiz-Vi...

item.title: Liberal Preferences and Electoral Shifts in Victoria's State Election
item.description: Antony Green analyses how shifting Liberal preferences might influence the outcome of Victoria's state election. The article references the 2010 campaign where Premier John Brumby faced challenges fro...

item.title: Nike Restructures Online Presence in China by Consolidating Distributors
item.description: Nike is implementing a significant strategy shift in its operations within China, aiming to streamline its digital marketplace and enhance the consumer experience. Starting in January 2026, the compan...

item.title: Labor's Dominance Masks Internal Struggles as Conference Unites the Party
item.description: The article highlights the paradoxical situation of Australia's Labor Party, which holds significant electoral dominance across multiple states yet faces internal challenges. While Labor maintains con...

item.title: Strategies for Early Detection and Prevention of Forest Fires
item.description: The article critiques current forest fire response strategies, arguing that priorities are inverted. Instead of focusing on suppression (stage 3) after fires escalate, the author emphasizes prevention...

item.title: Supreme Court declines suo motu action on Jantar Mantar protest police action
item.description: The Supreme Court on Wednesday declined a request from an advocate to take suo motu cognisance of the police action during a protest at Jantar Mantar in New Delhi. A bench comprising Chief Justice of ...

item.title: Wildfires Devastate Ontario First Nation, Aerial Photos Reveal Extent of Damage
item.description: Aerial photographs have captured the severe impact of wildfires on an Ontario First Nation community, highlighting the destruction caused by the blazes spreading across the northern region. The images...

item.title: Tinubu's administration faces scrutiny over fake agency and abuse of power
item.description: The article critiques President Tinubu's administration for its lack of accountability, highlighting the emergence of a 'fake' agency with no legal basis. It discusses how ministers abuse power with i...

item.title: The Urgency of Climate Change and Criticism of Nuclear Energy Solutions
item.description: This article discusses the escalating challenges posed by climate change, emphasizing that adaptation is now critical as global temperatures rise. The author argues that nuclear energy, often promoted...

item.title: Governor Radda Launches Cassava Processing Hub to Boost Katsina State Economy
item.description: Governor AbdulRahman Bello Radda of Katsina State has unveiled a state-of-the-art cassava/gari processing centre in Batsari Local Government Area, aiming to transform the agricultural sector and creat...

item.title: Sharon Otieno's Sister Confronts Grief as Court Delivers Final Verdict in Eight-Year Murder Case
item.description: Sharon Otieno's sister, @whi_tney14, posted an emotional TikTok tribute ahead of the final ruling in her sister's 2018 murder case, which has dragged on for eight years. The case, linking former Migor...

item.title: Canada's Track and Field Stars Shine at Commonwealth Games
item.description: The article previews Canada's top track and field athletes competing in the 2026 Commonwealth Games in Glasgow. Key highlights include the men's 4x100m relay team, led by Andre De Grasse, aiming for t...

item.title: strengthening pak-iran relations: president pezeshkian's call for regional unity
item.description: iranian president masoud pezeshkian emphasized the importance of strengthening pak-iran relations during a ceremony where he received the credentials of pakistan's new ambassador to iran, imran ahmed ...

item.title: Dispute Over Bullet Trains and Traditional Railways in India
item.description: The article discusses the ongoing debate in India regarding the introduction of bullet trains as a modern transportation solution versus the traditional railway system. The Indian government has been ...

item.title: Trump's White House Bunker and Paranoia: Expert Analysis on Strongman Mentality
item.description: The article discusses historian Ruth Ben-Ghiat's analysis of former President Donald Trump's obsession with constructing a bunker beneath his White House ballroom, linking it to the behavior of author...

item.title: Hiker's Journey on the Pacific Crest Trail: Challenges and Encounters
item.description: This article chronicles a hiker's experiences on the Pacific Crest Trail during days 16-20 of their journey. The narrative highlights the challenges of navigating sketchy creek crossings, dealing with...
